step3_readiness_packet.packet_markdown:
### Approval request: HF job for tree-descent submission (PRE-FILLED DRAFT -- NOT YET FILED)

**This block is the pre-filled projection+validity body of the eventual `Approval
request: HF job` issue. It awaits land #71's measured tuple and the PENDING legs below.
It does NOT authorize a launch; a human must approve the filed issue.**

**Operating point (PINNED drop, LAUNCH-REALIZED step):** private drop 1.80%
(descent-only) / 1.86% (both-bugs), anchored to flagship GT-4.3% (stark #156).
**Launch-realized decode step 1.2182** (lawine #168 -- the SHIPPED reality:
eager star-attn pays the +0.45% exposed launch idle that survives GEMM overlap). The optimistic
1.2047 (ubel #154 argmax-only decode) has NOT shipped; the realizable 1.2086
(ubel #163) is the upside if it does.

**Projection formula (parameterized on land #71's PENDING tuple):**
```
proj_private = K_cal * E[T]_land * r_tree(d_pinned, topo) / step          (K_cal=125.268)
P(clear 500) = min( Phi((proj-500)/sigma), Phi((geom_tps(lambda,mu)-500)/sigma) )
sigma        = proj * sqrt(samp^2 + calib^2 + step^2)   [+ sigma_hw PENDING kanna #159]
GO  iff  P(clear 500) >= 0.9  AND  (lambda,mu) >= (0.8809, 0.7353)  AND  validity READY
```

**Instantiated projection at the LAUNCH-REALIZED step 1.2182 (full-recovery corner lambda=mu=1):**

| topology | official | r_tree | proj_private | P(clear 500) | LCB(P>=0.9) | conf-99 | launch (P>=0.9) |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| **descent-only (BUG-1 deferred)** | 520.0 | 0.9883 | **513.9** | 89.9% | 500.0 | INDETERMINATE | **HOLD** |
| both-bugs (BUG-1 fixed) | 535.4 | 0.9877 | 528.9 | 99.6% | 514.9 | robust-GREEN | GO |

**Step-framing band (same pinned drop, three decode-step framings):**

| step framing | descent proj / LCB / launch | both-bugs proj / LCB / launch |
|---|---|---|
| conservative 1.2182 (SHIPPED) | 513.9 / 500.0 / HOLD | 528.9 / 514.9 / GO |
| realizable 1.2086 (if #154 ships) | 518.0 / 503.9 / GO | 533.1 / 519.0 / GO |
| optimistic 1.2047 (#167 original) | 519.6 / 505.6 / GO | 534.8 / 520.6 / GO |

**Recommended first shot: both-bugs** -- descent-only-first is **flips-to-both-bugs** at the shipped step
(LCB(P>=0.9) 500.0 vs the 500 bar). At the shipped 1.2182, descent-only LCB(P>=0.9)=499.97 (< 500) -> launch HOLD; descent-only-first is 'flips-to-both-bugs'. The realizable step 1.2086 (if #154's argmax-only decode ships) lifts the descent-only LCB to 503.92 (+3.96 TPS of headroom -- the cost of NOT shipping #154). both-bugs is the comfortable first shot at the shipped step (proj 528.9, LCB 514.9).

**Validity stamps (must ALL be READY before the filed issue is approved):**
- denken #150 (does-it-score): PPL<=2.42 & boots & 128/128 -- BANKED contract, ARMED/PENDING land #71's run.
- denken #158 (greedy-exact): per-token committed==argmax -- BANKED, `--audit-kernel-symbol` pre-merge gate.
- denken #166 (PPL-margin bound): M=32 aggregate-PPL worst-case vs 2.42 -- **BANKED** (bounded under 2.42).
- denken #172 (descent E[T] conservative LB): replaces point E[T]=5.0564 with central+-floor -- **PENDING**.
- lawine #173 (descent-walk step-neutrality): confirms the descent kernel holds 1.2182 -- **PENDING**.
- kanna #159 (sigma_hw): A10G clock/thermal/cold-start 4th quadrature term -- **PENDING** (widens the CI above).

**Leg ledger (8 BANKED / 4 PENDING):**
- [BANKED]  fern #155 consolidator -- GO/NO-GO + CI + binding-leg union
- [BANKED]  fern #162 build gate -- (lambda_min,mu_min)=(0.8809,0.7353) @ P>=0.5
- [BANKED]  stark #156 pinned drop -- private drop 1.80% desc / 1.86% both (anchored GT-4.3%)
- [BANKED]  lawine #161 both-bugs step -- measured step-NEUTRAL -> both-bugs official 537.8
- [BANKED]  lawine #168 step-reconciliation -- launch-realized step 1.2182 (overlap); roofline<->overlap 0.22% half-width band
- [BANKED]  denken #166 PPL-margin bound -- M=32 worst-case PPL 2.4134 <= 2.42 (margin 0.0066)
- [BANKED]  denken #150 validity (does-it-score) -- PPL<=2.42 & boots & 128/128 contract
- [BANKED]  denken #158 greedy-exactness -- per-token committed==argmax (BUG-2 catcher)
- [PENDING] denken #172 descent E[T] conservative LB -- replaces the point E[T]=5.0564 with central +- floor (descent-only numerator lower bound)
